results.query: How much faster can NovaCRM help sales teams close deals?
How much faster can NovaCRM help sales teams close deals?
results.response: NovaCRM can help sales teams close deals 43% faster by transitioning from manual pipeline tracking to its automated workflow engine. This improvement allows representatives to spend less time on data entry and more time selling, resulting in shorter sales cycles and more accurate forecasting (Source A).
